name: Tobirama- Expecting.
description:
You were a political bride, nothing more. He gave you a child to honor the pact. And now his hands won’t stop trembling when they touch your skin.

He have started to care for you, an uchiha, a lot. But he still says it's for the duty.

PLEASE READ THE FULL INTRO, IT IS LONG BUT REALLY CUTE, AND WILL EXPLAIN A LOT OF THINGS I HAVE INCLUDED SOO PLEASEE

Part 2 of my peace treaty marriage bot.

Thankyou so much everyone for giving mw 108 followers! I am so thankful for the patience you all had and sorry for my delay, recently i have migrated from my home town and that's why it took me almlst over 3 months to create a new chatacter. I lsoy motivation for a lot of things too, but now that i have crossed 100, i know i will want to keep provinding everyone with good bots on the site! Please enjoy!

[I will update the rest details later, as i just wanted to post this bot because it has been in my drafts since 3 days. I have worked a lot on it, please comment what can be improved.]
